seg.t: INCIDENT DATE: 2003.08.14. Flagged from TPS unusual-occurrence log 2003.08.18.
Danforth Avenue East, approx. 18:30 hrs. Responding officer: no evidence. Residents, upper floors: disoriented, no recall 16:15–19:00 hrs. No injuries. No charges.

Recording obtained 2003.08.20: handheld camcorder footage from a ground-floor resident, taped through the outage on battery. Subject (F, approx. 25–30) enters lobby, hesitates at the stairwell threshold approx. 45 sec., introduces
light source, departs approx. 3 min. later. Subject does not return to frame.
Building maintenance records: stairwell fixture confirmed operational continuously, min.
years prior to incident date. Classification:
